title: rubus arundelanus var. jeckylianus
intro: Rubus arundelanus var. jeckylianus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a rare and lesser-known species of bramble native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus arundelanus var. jeckylianus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and other gastrointestinal problems. Rubus arundelanus var. jeckylianus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine and folk remedies in the Himalayan region.
